message:
feat(component): Add process implementation tests

Phase 6: Process Interface - Steps 4-5 Complete

Added comprehensive unit tests in process_impl.zig (7 tests):
- test "Process - mapProcessError" - Tests error code mapping for all error types
- test "Process - unescapeJSON" - Tests JSON escape sequence handling (\n, \r, \t, \", \\)
- test "Process - parseJSONOutput simple" - Tests basic JSON parsing
- test "Process - parseJSONOutput with escapes" - Tests JSON with escape sequences
- test "Process - parseJSONOutput with special characters" - Tests quoted strings
- test "Process - parseJSONOutput empty output" - Tests empty stdout/stderr

Created process_integration_test.zig (3 integration tests):
- test "Process Component - integration test" - Verifies all 6 functions are registered
- test "Process Component - spawn-sync interface" - Tests spawn-sync interface
- test "Process Component - exec-sync interface" - Tests exec-sync interface
- test "Process Component - async workflow interface" - Tests async lifecycle (start → poll → output → free)

Implementation fixes:
- Fixed ArrayList usage to use ArrayListUnmanaged (Zig 0.15 API)
- Fixed JSON parsing to handle escape sequences properly
- Fixed integration tests to use proper slice types

Test status:
- Helper function tests compile and should pass (testable in isolation)
- Integration tests compile correctly but require WASM runtime for execution
- Tests verify interface contracts even when extern functions unavailable

Next: Verify existing component tests still pass, commit final Phase 6 implementation
